subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Blessed Beauty! This name of servitude which thou bearest is the pride of all created things and the glory of pure souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال مبارک این اسم عبودیت که بر تست فخر جواهر وجود است و مباهات سواذج
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
